Softener.title: ORG 200L Automatic Water Softener
Softener.description: ORG Automatic Water Softener removes hardness minerals like calcium and magnesium from water. It provides soft, scale-free water for the entire home, protecting plumbing, appliances, skin, and hair.
benefits: Keeps skin soft and prevents dryness
Makes hair smooth and healthy
Keeps clothes looking fresh and bright
Prevents scale buildup in plumbing and taps
Protects appliances like water heaters and washing machines
Provides soft water for the entire house

Softener.title: ORG 150L Automatic Water Softener
Softener.description: ORG 150L Automatic Water Softener removes hardness minerals like calcium and magnesium from water and provides soft, scale-free water for the entire home. It protects plumbing, appliances, skin, and hair.
benefits: Prevents skin dryness and keeps skin soft

Keeps clothes looking fresh and bright
Prevents scaling in appliances like water heaters and washing machines

Softener.title: ORG 100R Automatic Water Softener
Softener.description: ORG 100R Automatic Water Softener removes hardness minerals like calcium and magnesium from water and provides soft, scale-free water for your home. It protects plumbing, appliances, skin, and hair while improving the overall water quality.
benefits: Prevents skin dryness and keeps skin soft
Makes hair smooth and damage free
Keeps clothes looking fresh and bright
Prevents scaling in appliances like water heaters, washing machines, dishwashers, and water purifiers
Prevents scaling in taps, showers, and plumbing lines
Provides soft water for the entire house
specifications: Multiport Valve: Automatic Runxin Softener with Flow Controller (63604)
Application: Sump to Overhead Water Tank

Ultra Filter.title: Jumbo UF with Auto MPV
Ultra Filter.description: Jumbo UF with Automatic Multiport Valve is designed to remove turbidity, bacteria, viruses, and suspended particles from water. The system includes an automatic backwash feature that keeps the UF membrane clean and ensures continuous filtration performance.
benefits: Removes turbidity and suspended particles from water
Helps remove bacteria, viruses, and parasites
Improves water clarity and quality
Protects RO systems and softeners from clogging
Automatic backwash for easy maintenance
Compact design suitable for small commercial applications
specifications: Max Flow Rate: 1000 LPH (depending on TSS)
Backwash Interval: Approx. every 30 minutes (depending on TSS)

Ultra Filter.title: Jumbo UF with MPV
Ultra Filter.description: Jumbo UF Filter with Multiport Valve is designed to remove turbidity, bacteria, viruses, and suspended particles from water. It provides efficient filtration without electricity and is ideal as a pre-treatment filter before softeners, RO plants, and other water treatment systems.
benefits: Removes turbidity and suspended particles from water
Helps remove bacteria, viruses, and parasites
Improves water clarity and quality
Protects RO systems and softeners from clogging
No electricity required for operation
Easy maintenance with backwash facility
specifications: Max Flow Rate: <1000 LPH (depending on TSS)
Backwashing Interval: Approx. every 30 minutes (depending on TSS)

Domestic RO System.title: Generous HNC RO Water Dispenser (Hot, Normal, Cold)
Domestic RO System.description: Generous HNC is a premium RO water purifier with Hot, Normal, and Cold water dispensing. Built with durable SS 304 stainless steel cabinet and tanks, it is ideal for kitchens, offices, hospitals, institutions, and public places. The system delivers purified drinking water with convenient temperature options.
benefits: Provides Hot, Normal, and Cold purified drinking water
304 grade stainless steel body for durability and hygiene
Suitable for homes, offices, hospitals, and institutions
Advanced RO + UV purification for safe drinking water
Compressor-based cooling system for efficient cold water supply
Compact design with elegant finish
specifications: Purification Technology: RO + UV (Tank LED Type)
Filters: Sediment, Pre Carbon, Post Carbon
Temperature Limit: Cold 10–25°C, Hot up to 80°C
Installation Type: Table Top / Wall Mount with Stand
Product Dimension: H580 x L405 x W380 mm

Domestic RO System.title: MDRO Gold RO Water Purifier (Hot + Normal)
Domestic RO System.description: MDRO Gold is a premium RO water purifier with Hot and Normal water dispensing. It uses advanced RO, UF, and Mineral filtration technology to deliver safe and healthy drinking water. The system is designed with a durable SS 304 storage tank and cabinet, making it ideal for homes and offices.
benefits: Provides hot and normal purified drinking water
Advanced RO + UF + Mineral filtration technology
Removes bacteria, viruses, and harmful impurities
Improves taste and adds essential minerals to water
Durable SS 304 storage tank for hygienic water storage
Compact and stylish design suitable for home or office
specifications: Model: MDRO Gold (Hot Water + Normal Water)
Filters: Sediment, Pre Carbon, Post Carbon
Storage Capacity: Normal Water - 8L, Hot Water - 1L
Max Operation TDS: Up to 3000 PPM
Installation Type: Wall Mount (with clamp) / Counter Top
Colour: Gold Finish Front Side, Silver Finish Body

Domestic RO System.title: MDRO SS RO Water Purifier (Hot + Normal)
Domestic RO System.description: MDRO SS is a stainless-steel RO water purifier with Hot and Normal water dispensing. It uses advanced RO, UF, and Mineral filtration technology to provide safe and healthy drinking water. The SS 304 storage tank and cabinet ensure durability, hygiene, and long service life.
benefits: Provides hot and normal purified drinking water
Advanced RO + UF + Mineral filtration technology
Removes bacteria, viruses, and harmful impurities
Improves taste and restores essential minerals
Durable SS 304 storage tank for hygienic water storage
Compact and elegant stainless steel design
specifications: Model: MDRO SS (Hot Water + Normal Water)
Filters: Sediment, Pre Carbon, Post Carbon
Storage Capacity: Normal Water - 8L, Hot Water - 1L
Max Operation TDS: Up to 3000 PPM
Installation Type: Wall Mount (with clamp) / Counter Top
